name: every GDPR rule in the pre-authored european-union namespace cites the authoritative eur-lex URL from the C-13 registry
command: grep -c 'docs_url: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2016/679/oj' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/european-union/gdpr.yaml" | awk '$1 >= 5 { exit 0 } { exit 1 }' && echo gdpr-cites-eur-lex 1>&2
